---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description"
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## 🌋 Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. For example: *"I'm frustrated when..."*

## 🚀 Describe the feature you'd like

Describe the feature you want to see implemented clearly.

## 🎯 Describe the desired behavior

Explain how you expect it to work, with examples if possible.

## 🔍 Describe alternatives you've considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions? Mention them here.

## 📚 Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or ideas that might help clarify your request.
